_meta.keyKnowledge: We select and manipulate visual conventions, processes and materials to create artworks.

_source.w: We select and manipulate visual conventions, processes and materials to create artworks.
y: Making deliberate choices about visual conventions and materials gives our art greater impact and meaning.
Manipulating art processes with skill enables us to realise our creative vision effectively.
Selecting appropriate approaches for each artwork develops our artistic judgement.
eg: We choose specific visual conventions — composition, perspective, colour theory — to strengthen our artwork.
We select materials and processes that best suit the concept we want to communicate.
We experiment with combining different media and techniques in a single work.
We develop a series of artworks that explore a theme from different angles.
We create work that demonstrates control of our chosen materials and processes.
We make intentional decisions about scale, surface quality and presentation of our art.
